problem id: 0a5e80bf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  11001011 -> 11000110
  01110111 -> 11000011
  10101101 -> 01000101
  10110111 -> 11000101
  00101010 -> 10000001
  10000101 -> 01000100
  01001000 -> 00000010
  10001111 -> 11000100
  00111111 -> 11000001
  10100110 -> 10000101

query: 11101101
predicted answer: 01000111
